name: mackerel-company
description: Mackerel Company: Another Shift - mobile cooperative survival web game

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,cyan "npm run dev -w @mackerel/server" "npm run dev -w @mackerel/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @mackerel/shared && npm run build -w @mackerel/content && npm run build -w @mackerel/simulation && npm run build -w @mackerel/client && npm run build -w @mackerel/server
